settings.heading: Build the future of prevention-first security.
settings.lede: Mitipi is a Swiss company rethinking home security around privacy, believable presence simulation, and AI—without cameras or microphones.
settings.cta_subheading: Tell us what you build and why Kevin matters to you.

settings.heading: Growth. Security. Innovation. Integrity.
settings.body: We bring joy and security to customers worldwide. We think beyond the obvious—and we empower young talents and people with disabilities to grow with us.

settings.title: Growth
settings.body: We believe in a bright future for all of us. We strive to grow and develop a better future for everyone.

settings.title: Security
settings.body: We are bringing joy and security to the world and to our customers—prevention-first, privacy-respecting protection.

settings.title: Innovation
settings.body: We think beyond the obvious and come up with solutions nobody thought of before—from shadow simulation to AI household sounds.

settings.heading: Small team. Global mission.
settings.body: Under CEO Patrick Cotting, more than 30 people work on Kevin across Switzerland, California, Germany, and partner locations worldwide.

settings.image_alt: Kevin® protecting a home while residents are away
settings.title: What we work on
settings.body: Hardware, mobile apps, AI sound generation, brand storytelling, and global expansion. If you care about physical security without surveillance, we would like to hear from you.

settings.title: Open roles
settings.body: There are no public job listings on kevinswiss.com at this time. Send your CV and a short note about what you would like to work on—we keep promising profiles on file for future openings.
